independent_verifier_summary.notes: Initial parallel verifier attempt hit 429. Verification was rerun sequentially. All verifier issues were repaired by narrowing unsupported wording, changing evidence IDs, or reframing broad annual-report excerpts as event/mechanism excerpts. Labels remain agent_verified_candidate, not human gold.

dataset.name: nerc_causal_qa_40doc_agent_audit
dataset.notes: 40-document pre-three-pack expansion. First 25 documents come from agent_audit_25doc; 15 additional processed NERC documents were annotated and independently verified. Some added documents are event-focused excerpts within broader reliability or lessons reports, with answers narrowed to cited evidence.

selection_notes.caveat: Some added documents are event-focused excerpts inside broader reliability/lessons documents; answers must be narrowed to cited evidence.

label_provenance: agent_verified_candidate; not human gold or expert gold

metadata.allowed_scope: post-freeze supplemental BM25 baseline and K={1,3,5} sensitivity only

paired_comparisons.method: document-level paired cluster bootstrap over documents

task: NERC report sentences + causal role/question -> evidence_sentence_ids
